# Bryan Coup — Premium GMC & Buick, Indianapolis

> Personal sales storefront of Bryan Coup at Ed Martin Buick GMC (Indianapolis area, serving Carmel, Fishers, Westfield, Noblesville, all of Central Indiana). Specialty: Denali and premium GMC allocation most dealers cannot get (Denali, Denali Ultimate, AT4X) plus transparent monthly lease specials.

Process: credit-first. Numbers by text, secure credit application and documents handled remotely, customer arrives and signs in about 20 minutes, or vehicle is delivered.
Contact: call/text (463) 214-0522
Two tracks: (1) The Access List — hard-to-find premium builds, on-ground and inbound inventory; (2) Monthly Movers — 3-5 featured units with transparent payments each month.
